title: Update TypeScript types for sender registration
description: Update src/types/multi-tenant.ts Store interface to include wa_sender_registered, wa_sender_id, wa_sender_registered_at, and wa_sender_last_verified fields. Update StoreInfo interface in src/integrations/whatsapp/types.ts if needed.

title: Build WhatsApp sender registration UI component
description: Create src/components/settings/WhatsAppSenderRegistration.tsx with status display (registered/not registered badges), verify status button, register sender link, and step-by-step instructions. Include visual indicators with CheckCircle2/XCircle icons.

title: Integrate sender registration into Store Settings page
description: Update src/pages/StoreManagementPage.tsx to import and display WhatsAppSenderRegistration component. Show component only when wa_use_store_number is enabled. Pass storeId, storePhone, and waUseStoreNumber props.

title: Create useWhatsAppSenderRegistration React hook
description: Implement src/hooks/useWhatsAppSenderRegistration.ts with methods: checkSenderStatus (verify phone number registration), verifySender (check by sender ID), and automatic database updates. Include loading states and error handling with toast notifications.

title: Create WhatsPoints API client service
description: Implement src/integrations/whatsapp/whatspoints-client.ts with methods to list senders, check registration status, get sender ID, and verify sender status. Include TypeScript interfaces for WhatsPointsSender and RegisterSenderResponse.

title: Implement WhatsApp sender registration serverless function
description: Create api/whatsapp-sender-register.js Vercel serverless function with actions: list (all senders), check (verify phone registration), and verify (check sender by ID). Handle CORS and authentication with WhatsPoints API.

title: Add WhatsPoints environment variables
description: Add VITE_WHATSPOINTS_API_URL, VITE_WHATSPOINTS_API_USERNAME, VITE_WHATSPOINTS_API_PASSWORD, VITE_WHATSPOINTS_REGISTRATION_URL to .env.example. Document in README. Add WHATSPOINTS_API_URL, WHATSPOINTS_API_USERNAME, WHATSPOINTS_API_PASSWORD to Vercel production environment.

title: Test WhatsApp sender registration integration
description: End-to-end testing: verify database migration, test API endpoints (list/check/verify), test UI component displays correct status, test verification flow updates database, test error handling and edge cases. Validate in development environment before production.

title: Deploy WhatsApp sender registration to production
description: Deploy database migration to Supabase production. Deploy serverless function to Vercel. Deploy UI updates. Configure production environment variables. Monitor deployment and verify functionality. Create rollback plan if issues occur.

title: Add WhatsApp sender registration database schema
description: Create migration 20260126000000_add_whatsapp_sender_registration.sql to add wa_sender_registered, wa_sender_id, wa_sender_registered_at, and wa_sender_last_verified columns to stores table. Update get_user_stores function to include new fields.
